# Page Not Found

### About

- [About the Joyce Foundation](https://www.joycefdn.org/about)

### Grants

- [Grant Guidelines](https://www.joycefdn.org/grants)

### Apply

- [How to Apply](https://www.joycefdn.org/apply)

Research Report


[**100 Critical Questions for Gun Violence Research**](https://www.joycefdn.org/research-reports/insights-research-reports-100-critical-questions-for-gun-violence-research)

The Joyce Foundation released a new report in January 2021 on the next generation of gun violence prevention research, identifying new paths of inquiry into reducing gun deaths and injuries in America.

- [Gun Violence Prevention & Justice Reform](https://www.joycefdn.org/insights?program%5B0%5D=816#search)

Research Report


[**25 Years of Gun Violence Prevention Research Grant Making**](https://www.joycefdn.org/research-reports/25-years-of-gun-violence-prevention-research-grant-making)

In 1993, Joyce launched the Gun Violence Program (now known as the Gun Violence Prevention & Justice Reform Program), grounded in our belief that gun violence must be treated as a public health issue, and focused on evidence-informed policies.

- [Gun Violence Prevention & Justice Reform](https://www.joycefdn.org/insights?program%5B0%5D=816#search)

Webinar


[**Building bridges to post-secondary success in Minnesota**](https://www.joycefdn.org/webinars/building-bridges-to-post-secondary-success-in-minnesota)

A group of education and workforce leaders in Minnesota released a report with a comprehensive set of recommendations to ensure that more young people earn a post-secondary degree or credential.

- [Education & Economic Mobility](https://www.joycefdn.org/insights?program%5B0%5D=348#search)

Webinar


[**Briefing on New Illinois Criminal Justice Legislation**](https://www.joycefdn.org/webinars/briefing-on-new-illinois-criminal-justice-legislation)

In January 2021, the Illinois General Assembly passed the most comprehensive criminal justice reform legislation in recent memory. The Joyce Foundation, Illinois Justice Project, & BPI hosted a briefing to discuss the key elements of the 700-page bill.

- [Gun Violence Prevention & Justice Reform](https://www.joycefdn.org/insights?program%5B0%5D=816#search)

News


[**Announcing New Joyce Awards Funding Opportunities through United States Artists**](https://www.joycefdn.org/news/announcing-new-joyce-awards-funding-opportunities)

The Joyce Foundation Expands Signature Program with New Artist-centered, Statewide Model in Six States and issues a call for 2026 Artist Self-Nominations through May 4.

- [Culture](https://www.joycefdn.org/insights?program%5B0%5D=90#search)
